ddls:
CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the actor */,
  "actor_type" TEXT /* Type of actor */,
  "actor_status" TEXT /* Current status of the actor */,
  "actor_leader" TEXT /* Name of the leader or primary figure of the actor */,
  "actor_founding_date" TEXT /* Date when the actor was founded */,
  "actor_dissolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the actor was dissolved (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "event_type_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the event type */,
  "event_type_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the event type on the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "country_area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "country_gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country */,
  "country_government_type" TEXT /* Type of government */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrative_regions" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrative region */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrative region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Country where the administrative region is located */,
  "admin_population" INTEGER /* Population of the administrative region */,
  "admin_area" REAL /* Area of the administrative region in square kilometers */,
  "admin_government_type" TEXT /* Type of local government */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Administrative region where the location is situated */,
  "location_population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "location_area" REAL /* Area of the location in square kilometers */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the source */,
  "source_last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the source was updated */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fatalities" (
  "fatality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fatality record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Event where the fatalities occurred */,
  "number_of_fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities */,
  "fatalities_civilians" INTEGER /* Number of civilian fatalities */,
  "fatalities_military" INTEGER /* Number of military fatalities */,
  "fatalities_cause" TEXT /* Cause of the fatalities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fatality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction type */,
  "interaction_name" TEXT /* Name of the interaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction type */,
  "interaction_duration" INTEGER /* Typical duration of the interaction type */,
  "interaction_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the interaction type on the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the event was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actor_event" (
  "actor_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor-event association */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actor_event_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_type_event" (
  "event_type_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type-event association */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_type_event_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_event" (
  "country_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country-event association */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_event_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_region_event" (
  "admin_region_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrative region-event association */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the administrative region */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_region_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admin_region_event_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES administrative_regions ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_event" (
  "location_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location-event association */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_event_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "source_event" (
  "source_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source-event association */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_source_event_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)
